## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes introduced by this pull request (e.g., new governance protocol, updated developer guide, or asset export).

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix / adjustment
- [ ] New documentation or guide
- [ ] Asset or export update
- [ ] Protocol or core template update

## Checklist for Reviewers and Contributors
- [ ] I have run the relevant build scripts (e.g., `build_docs.sh` or `build_assets.sh`).
- [ ] I have added a relevant entry to the `CHANGELOG.md` at the project root.
- [ ] The changes comply with the Community Rules Agreement.
